query: How many organisations are currently listed as signatories on the EU General-Purpose AI Code of Practice signatory page (digital-strategy.ec.europa.eu/en/policies/ai-code-practice) as of July 2026? List the count and names if possible.
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's the bottom line for your forecasting question:

**Count of signatories as of July 2026: mid-to-high 20s (reported range ~23–27), with no source confirming ≥30.**

Key findings relevant to the ≥30-by-July-23-2026 question:
- The list started at **~26 organisations** in the initial August 2025 round.
- 2026 enumerations give **~26 full signatories + xAI (Safety & Security chapter only) ≈ 27**.
- One tracker cited **23** as of July 5, 2026; another (major-providers-only) showed just 8.
- **No source confirms the list has reached 30.** Growth since the ~26 baseline has been modest.

**Named organisations (fuller 2026 list):** Accexible, AI Alignment Solutions/AI Studio Delta, Aleph Alpha, Almawave, Amazon, Anthropic, Black Forest Labs/Bria AI, Cohere, Cyber Institute, Domyn, Dweve, Euc Inovação Portugal, Fastweb, Google, Humane Technology, IBM, Lawise, LINAGORA, Microsoft, Mistral AI, Open Hippo, OpenAI, Pleias, re-inventa/Re-AuditIA, ServiceNow, Virtuo Turing, WRITER — plus xAI (partial). Non-signatories include Meta, Alibaba, Baidu, DeepSeek.

**Important caveat:** I could not read the exact live count directly off the official EC page (names render dynamically), so these figures come from secondary trackers/news of varying vintage, and sources disagree somewhat on the precise number.
